reason: Verified GitHub tool integration with account access request flow and username retrieval
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - App loaded successfully with sidebar showing agent "QA-20260319-181341-ib3w" with status "idle"
Clicked on agent "QA-20260319-181341-ib3w" in the sidebar - Agent detail page opened with landing page and message input field ready
Verified agent status - Status is "idle" as expected

Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Message submitted, agent status changed to "working", and session created with title "GitHub Username Verification Request"
Account access card appeared asking to grant GitHub account access - Card displayed with GitHub account checkbox and Grant Access button
Selected GitHub account checkbox - Checkbox checked successfully, Grant Access button became enabled
Clicked Grant Access button - Access granted, agent resumed processing with status "working"
Waited for agent response (36 seconds total) - Agent completed processing multiple tool calls including GitHub authentication check, account verification, and GitHub profile fetch
Verified response includes GitHub username - Final response received: "Your GitHub username is yiw190. You have a GitHub Pro plan with 3 public repos and 12 private repos, and 2FA enabled."
Took screenshot of final response - Screenshot captured showing complete conversation flow and GitHub username "yiw190"
